title: Akdang-deul ui Huwonja ga Doeeotda
description: One day, I woke up as a noble inside the game I used to play. Unfortunately, the game ends in an apocalypse. With ten years left, I track down the future villains while theyΓÇÖre still kids and decide to raise them myself, hoping that a better childhood could stop them from destroying the world. Now, with criminals dropping like flies, the kingdom thinks IΓÇÖm the terrifying mastermind pulling all the strings. What on earth is happening? I just wanted to enjoy the sweet noble life!

title: Back to Rule Again

A young man named Yang Fan was betrayed by his girlfriend while he and his sister at death's door, when suddenly, he traveled back to the past. Last time, you guys bullied me and sold me out. This time, with the power of the ring, only the strongest can survive. And I, am the strongest.

One day, a beautiful girl enters Tatsuya's room... only to reveal that itΓÇÖs his father, completely transformed by the shock of losing his job!
Confused by the father he no longer recognizes, Tatsuya begins to experience gradual changes in their once-distant father-son relationship.
As the father takes on a more motherly role, and Tatsuya starts acting more like the father, or perhaps a close friend becomes like a father figure...

A new TS comedy that, despite being called ΓÇÿbiologically impossibleΓÇÖ on social media, is surprisingly a father-son story that will warm your heart!

title: I Look Too Much Like the Boss and the World Actually Believes It
description:
Moon king, Su Liang! The invincible youth who commands the Moon God Flash ButterflyΓÇöa divine entity capable of rewinding time and reversing the laws of yin and yangΓÇöto reign supreme over this world! To think IΓÇÖd transmigrate here and get handed such an overpowered identity cardΓÇª a heavenly golden finger from the start, right? WRONG! The beast inside me isnΓÇÖt the legendary Moon God Flash Butterfly at all! ItΓÇÖs just the lowest-tier, weakest Flash ButterflyΓÇª a glorified glowstick with wings!

Now, staring down millions of fanatical devotees, a three-year deathmatch with the Cang Yue Emperor, and every major sect plotting my demiseΓÇª This isΓÇª an unprecedented crisis for a weak beast tamer like me!

title: Kyou kara, Hitozuma Mansion ni Nyuukyo shimasu.
description: In this apartment complex, all the residents are married women whose husbands are away on businessΓÇöexcept for one. title: Manager Kim
description:
"Please donΓÇÖt touch the guy wearing glassesΓÇª"
Department head Kim, who quit his job as a special agent only for his daughter Minji and chose to be normal. Then one day, Minji disappeared silently, and Manager Kim began to find his daughter by turning the country that monitors him into the enemy.

title: Maou to Ryuuou ni Sodaterareta Shounen wa Gakuen Seikatsu wo Musou suru You desu
description: A boy named Ruisha is trapped in a distorted space created by the ancient hero. What he finds there is the Demon King and the Dragon King, who should have been defeated by the hero 300 years ago. Ruisha befriends the Demon King and the Dragon King, and is trained by them, going from a weak child to a legendary warrior with the power of both demons and dragons. Using his power, Ruisha escaped from the strange place and was accepted into the magic academy where the heroΓÇÖs descendants live. And now he will have to face many challenges to free the Demon King and Dragon King.

title: Mia-ga dorawatda
description:
Five years ago, my first love, Cha Mia, disappeared. Now, she has reappeared before me, completely changed.
An unexpected reunion at the police stationΓÇª and she turns out to be a freshman at the same university?

The story of two people who thought it was over begins again on campus... or so I thought, but she still insists on letting the past go.

title: Ore no Level Up ga Okashii! ~Dekiru Otoko no Isekai Tensei~
description:
Zarmen, an adventurer who can't level up decides to retire from the adventurer business. Furthermore, in order to graduate from virginity, he decided to splurge on all the assets that he had diligently saved up since his reincarnation at a high-class brothel. The woman who appeared in front of him was the finest woman he would ever have known. Thanks to her hospitality, Zarmen fully enjoys his first time, but at that moment, his ears hear a mysterious announcement...

[Impregnation confirmed.]
[Level up!]

"Does this mean that the more 'seeding' I do, the stronger I get?"

title: Sexual Situations With a Childhood Friend
description: One-pagers depicting a childhood friend in a suggestive and/or sexual situation with the protagonist.

title: TS Tensei shite Masaka no Sub Heroine ni.
description:
A hikikomori boy who died while dreaming of a harem was reborn as one of the heroes who will save the world. The harem he aimed for would surely be there! Next to the hikikomori was someone reincarnated as the female white mage Fio, centering on the hero Alto. Fio is still crazy about girls even after her reincarnation, but the turning point comes when the party is split up by a surprise attack by the demon king's army and she and Alto take refuge in an abandoned hut.

In order to save Fio, Alto drinks a powerful potion that gives him temporary power but causes him to go into heat as a side effect... Their relationship takes an unexpected turn!

title: The Villain Wants to Live
description:
Deculein von Grahan-Yukline is the mid-boss of the AAA-grade game REW was developing. A villain who dies 999 times out of 1,000.

One day, Kim Woojin, a game developer for REW, woke up as him.

As a villain, Deculein is inevitably destined to perish.

[Primary Survival Goal: Become necessary to the game.]

If death is his fate, then he will twist fate itself to survive.

title: Unbalance Triangle
description:
Taehyun Choi lives with his sister Hakyung Choi. You could say they have a normal life. 
Hakyung has a good job and is successful, however Taehyun isn't good at studying.  
  
His life takes a drastic change when he accidentally learns that he and Hakyung aren't siblings. 
Thus he decides to confront her, but then she suffers a serious accident and loses her memory.  
  
This is where everything will change, because those feelings of kinship will become much more important.
tags: Psychological,Long Strip,Romance,Comedy,Drama,School Life,Web Comic,Slice of Life,Full Color

title: Zh├¿ Y├¡ Sh├¼ W╟Æ Y├áo D─üng Zh├¼ Z┼½n
description: What happens when a former martial sovereign gets reborn into a complete loser's body? Gu Feiyang, a legendary martial artist who was ranked third-strongest in the continent, finds himself in this predicament when he wakes up in the body of 15-year-old Li Yunxiao. Li Yunxiao was once a failure who had yet to open a single chakra point in his body, but now he's morphed into a genius martial artist overnight and becomes the talk (and target) of the town. Armed with the expertise of his former life, Li Yunxiao is on a mission to complete the ultimate incantation that killed him in the first place - all while wiping the floor with his former bullies at school. Will he be able to exceed the accomplishments of his previous life? One thing's for certain: no one will ever call him a loser again!
